subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards the Kingdom of Abhá! In this moment when the effulgent rays of the Sun, the Sustainer of earth and heaven, illumine the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی در این اوان که اشراقات شمس قیوم الارض و السماء آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @light and darkness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
